zh.Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德
zh.Addington, Surrey, England: 英國素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Mohun於1252年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親John de Mohun26歲，母親Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'20歲。她於1276年8月17日之後與John de Cantelupe在英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年之後在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Mohun于1252年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲John de Mohun26岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'20岁。她于1276年8月17日之后与John de Cantelupe在英国瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年之后在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Mohun was born in 1252, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, John de Mohun, was 26 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', was 20. She married John de Cantelupe after 17 August 1276, in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1318, in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Mohun est née en 1252, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Mohun, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John de Cantelupe après 17 août 1276, à Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1318, à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Mohun 1252 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Mohun 26 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' 20. Sie hat nach 17. August 1276 in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England John de Cantelupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1318 in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Mohun è nata il nel 1252 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, John de Mohun, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John de Cantelupe dopo il 17 agosto 1276, nel Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1318, nel Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Mohunが1252年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父John de Mohunは26歳，母Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'は20歳であった。1276年8月17日以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスニッテルフィールドでJohn de Cantelupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年以後にイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Mohun(이)가 1252년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mohun(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1276년 8월 17일 이후 영국 워윅실르 스니터필드에서 John de Cantelupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 이후 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Mohun nasceu em 1252, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Mohun, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Cantelupe após 17 de agosto de 1276, em Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1318, em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Mohun родилась в 1252 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Mohun было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Cantelupe после 17 августа 1276 г. в местности сниттирфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1318 г. в местности девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Mohun nació en 1252, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Mohun, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', tenía 20 años. Se casó con John de Cantelupe después de 17 de agosto de 1276, en Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1318, en Devon, Inglaterra.
